text.message: Your set up is too good
Best road path. Good port. Good ows
best road path with no brick?
Because you got the middle path
Hard for anyone else to compete once you get set up
I don’t even know why you wanted that spot tbh
Doesn’t do a ton for you
and you wonder why i want to boost wheat ore sheep
Seems like port city dev dev dev
dude i put my road and settle before you
